sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29088" key="dusiate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ῑᾱτέω</orth>, <sense id="n29088.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be hard to heal</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
